human_verification.notes: Reviewed the agricultural compliance specialist package for boundary strictness, authoritative-source grounding, scenario coverage, escalation posture, and marketplace-ready packaging.

review_notes: Readiness evidence is complete across manifest, scenarios, functionality map, research summary, evaluation results, release notes, deployment notes, and marketing notes.
The package explicitly records that runtime remains specification-based until a trusted built version is separately promoted.

specialist_owned_evidence: Authority references are grounded in federal agricultural, environmental, and food-safety sources with explicit refresh and decay policy.
Scenarios cover normal in-scope work, missing-evidence handling, conflicting policies, legal-interpreation refusal, seasonal and traceability dependency gaps, and adjacent-owner handoff requirements.
Package includes a deployment rollback path and explicit separation from legal, veterinary, agronomic, and environmental-authority signoff.
notes: No unreviewed regressions were identified in local package review.
Ready for market deployment as a specification-based specialty pack with clear escalation into adjacent specialists.
